title: Trimmable Swords
description: Adds custom textures on swords with the armor trim modifier
body:
# Trimmable Swords!
If you've ever wanted to customize your weapons looks through trim smithing templates, now you can!
## Description
This is a resource pack that adds new textures for swords with the armor trim modifier giving them new shapes and decor mildly inspired by each of the various trim types. The textures can be accesed by applying a trim modifier in a /give command. Or by using [this datapack I made](https://modrinth.com/datapack/trimmable-swords-datapack) or something similar that lets them be trimmed directly in a smithing table.

![Grid showcasing each trim variant on diamond swords.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f77bed159505e2549fb2f300f49d35ded605e02c.png)

Note that other sword-related resource packs active simultaniously could override eachother.
